ID: US-OLV-031
Title: Visualize org chart
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a account manager
I want an org chart from stakeholder reporting data
So that I can understand influence and reporting relationships

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] OrgChart renders people nodes and connecting lines.
- [ ] Users can drag or keyboard-navigate supported org chart interactions.
- [ ] Selecting a person opens detail context.
- [ ] Circular reporting relationships are guarded against.

Notes: Touch behavior and circular guards were added in follow-up fixes.
